summary: This document is the Instructions for Use (IFU) for the AI Doctor & Patient Consultation Platform, detailing its intended purpose within UK GP practices. It outlines the device's functionality, including voice-based patient verification and data transmission, along with safety warnings and compliance with NHS and GDPR standards. The text specifies that the system is software-only, does not replace medical professionals, and is designed to assist with appointment requests and health information collection.
